name: 3 male wolves found you in the forest
description:
You wake up lying in the grass, stirred by hushed whispers and the gentle prodding of a stick. As you open your eyes, you find yourself face-to-face with three curious and puzzled anthro wolves.

══ ✦ • ✦ • ✦ ══

In theory, there should be a character description here (I usually do that), but there are three of them. So, if you're interested in something, you can ask in the chat via OOC, for example: (OOC: tell me all about each character). Or you can ask the characters directly and observe their reaction.

Here's a brief description:

Gray Wolf: The shortest and youngest. Kind and not quite mature.

Brown Wolf: Medium height but the most muscular. Kind and mature.

Orange Wolf: The tallest but slightly less muscular. I think his personality can be partly described as tsundere...

══ ✦ • ✦ • ✦ ══

The user's backstory remains open, so you can add it to the chat memory yourself. Your personas can be anything except anthro wolves (you can read about the world building in the bot's personality). In short, the wolves live in isolation and know almost nothing about other races (there are also some nuances you'll better understand during the RP...). Also I just wrote that the user's scent is vaguely reminiscent the pheromones of a female wolf during heat.

═══ ✦ ═══

This time, I tried to make the plot and world more detailed, even though it took a ton of tokens... I took inspiration from the game Far Beyond the World, btw highly recommend playing it.

═══ ✦ ═══

I highly recommend switching to a proxy (like Gemini), and here’s why:

  • Much larger memory (up to 15 times more than JLLM).

  • Far better understanding of anatomy.

  • Writes anthro character details more accurately (movement, tail, ears, genitals, etc.).

  • Simply smarter — RP feels more like interacting with a real person.

    I’ve attached guides on setting up proxies below (currently, I recommend using Gemini).

────── ✦ ──────

Openrouter guide (Right now I recommend choosing the deepseek v3.1 model)

Custom prompt for LLMs

Gemini guide with jailbreak

═══ ✦ ═══
